text:
Jan Beich <jbeich@tormail.org> wrote:

I am very sorry, for I missed the message.
I thought no significant change is applied to the minor release.
I do not want to update my OS, for I am apprehensive that the result of some important 
calculation might be effected.  If it would not happen, I can update to recent 8-STABLE...
